# Straight Line F1

> Straight Line F1 (Straight Line F1 Stats Data Hub) is a research-focused archive
> of Formula 1 historical data: race results, championships, drivers, teams,
> constructors, circuits, and statistics from 1950 to today.

## Sections

- [Seasons](https://f1statsdatahub.com/seasons): every F1 season and its events
- [Drivers](https://f1statsdatahub.com/drivers): driver profiles, careers, and stats
- [Teams](https://f1statsdatahub.com/teams): teams and their results
- [Constructors](https://f1statsdatahub.com/constructors): constructors and lineage
- [Circuits](https://f1statsdatahub.com/circuits): circuits and event history
- [Statistics](https://f1statsdatahub.com/stats/global): global, driver, and constructor stats

## Developers

- Public API docs: https://api.f1statsdatahub.com/v1/docs
- An MCP connector is available for AI assistants (Claude Desktop and others).

## Notes

- Data covers all FIA Formula 1 World Championship events from 1950 to the present.
- This site is an independent, non-commercial archive and is not affiliated with
  Formula 1, the FIA, or any team.
